rows.label: qev041402_MSG0001
rows.name: Phew... Just dragging the completely withdrawn Elder all the way out here was a job in itself, mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041402_MSG0002
rows.name: Good grief, he is supposed to be sick, yet he still has the energy to throw a tantrum, which makes it even worse, mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041402_MSG0003
rows.name:
Be quiet, mo!
*Cough* *Cough*... There is no way everyone is going to launch fireworks for me, mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041402_MSG0004
rows.name:
It is fine, mo. Nun will just fade away... *Cough*...
all alone in this place, mo...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041402_MSG0005
rows.name:
...Hey, you there?
The Nopon in the various regions did not care about Nun at all, did they, mo?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041402_MSG0006
rows.name:
...I knew it, mo.
But you were too honest, and it hurt a little, mo.
You should have sugarcoated it, mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041402_MSG0007
rows.name:
...Stop with the transparent lies, mo.
It is fine. Nobody needs Nun anyway, mo...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041402_MSG0008
rows.name:
...It is almost the promised time, mo.
We will surely see proof that everyone cares about the Elder at least a little bit, mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041402_MSG0009
rows.name:
*Cough* *Cough*...
Hmph...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041402_MSG0010
rows.name:
Grandpa, I am hungry, mo.
I want something to eat, mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041402_MSG0011
rows.name:
...Gah! This is a very important moment, mo...
Keep quiet for a second, will you![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041402_MSG0012
rows.name:
I do not care about fireworks, mo!
More importantly, food, food...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041402_MSG0013
rows.name: ...Ah!![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041402_MSG0014
rows.name:
Ah... Aah...
This is...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041402_MSG0015
rows.name:
...Do you see now, mo?
Everyone did not leave this place because they disliked you, Elder, mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041402_MSG0016
rows.name:
*Cough* *Cough*...
But they all abandoned Nun...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041402_MSG0017
rows.name:
No... that is right, mo...
Since ancient times, Nopon have always lived alongside their journeys, mo...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041402_MSG0018
rows.name:
Aah... Nun was a fool, mo...
To forget something so obvious and say I wanted to disappear...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041402_MSG0019
rows.name:
That is right, mo...
Even though everyone is working so hard to continue their businesses in so many different places...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041402_MSG0020
rows.name:
Never mind that, give me food, mo!
Looking at fireworks will not fill my stomach, mo!![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041402_MSG0021
rows.name: Gah! You are too noisy, mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041402_MSG0022
rows.name:
...Just as Ngogo planned, the Elder has regained his energy, mo.
Now I will not have to listen to his annoying complaints for a while, mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041402_MSG0023
rows.name:
Thank you, [ST:playername ], mo!
I will hand over your reward according to our contract, mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041402_MSG0024
rows.name: Phew... Just dragging the Elder out here while he is completely obsessed with Pissa was a job in itself, mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041402_MSG0025
rows.name: Good grief, he is supposed to be sick, but his energy for that sort of thing has not waned at all, which makes it even worse, mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041402_MSG0026
rows.name:
Be quiet, mo!
*Cough* *Cough*... There is no way everyone is going to launch fireworks for me, mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041402_MSG0027
rows.name: It is fine, mo. Nun will just disappear in this place... *Cough*... while feeling up Pissa, mo...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041402_MSG0028
rows.name:
...Hey, you there?
The Nopon in the various regions did not care about Nun at all, did they, mo?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041402_JNK0030
rows.name: Affirm

rows.label: qev041402_SEL0031
rows.name: Nod and agree that is the case.

rows.label: qev041402_JNK0040
rows.name: Deny

rows.label: qev041402_SEL0041
rows.name: Cheer him up by saying they did care about him.

rows.label: qev041402_MSG0029
rows.name:
...I knew it, mo.
But you were too honest, and it hurt a little, mo.
You should have sugarcoated it, mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041402_MSG0030
rows.name:
...Stop with the transparent lies, mo.
It is fine. Nobody needs Nun anyway, mo...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041402_MSG0031
rows.name:
...It is almost the promised time, mo.
We will surely see proof that everyone cares about the Elder at least a little bit, mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041402_MSG0032
rows.name:
*Cough* *Cough*...
Hmph...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041402_MSG0033
rows.name: ...Ah! The sound of fireworks...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041402_MSG0034
rows.name:
Ah... Aah...
This is...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041402_MSG0035
rows.name: Eek... Eeeeek!![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041402_MSG0036
rows.name:
Wait... huh?
Those are fireworks from Pissa's caravan, mo!
W-what in the world is happening...?![ST:wait ]
